title: Organagrams
excerpt: Does anybody have any recommendations of creating organagrams within monday or another app?

posts.author: Steve_Dixon (Steve Dixon)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anybody have any recommendations of creating organagrams within monday or another app?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are on an enterprise plan - https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360013189179-The-Org-Chart-Widget

There is a built in org chart widget. Thats the first place I’d start.
